## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Armchair;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Armchair { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
sofa, furniture, leisure, lounge, loveseat, couch

## Categories
home

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/armchair)
